entries.source: How did you get that scar?
I am forever indebted to him.
I went inside to drink coffee.
Do you need something to drink?
It has rained a lot here.
A few firefighters suffered minor injuries.
How did it go last night?
I am forever indebted to her.
I wondered the same thing myself.
The accident created a traffic jam.
I gave Tom a huge hug.
I really owe you an apology.
What could possibly have gone wrong?
Could you make me some tea?
I loved going to the beach.
This wheel wobbles when it turns.
Where will we find the truth?
Actually, I do not really know.
Last night, I read a book.
entries.reference: ನೆನ್ನೆ ರಾತ್ರಿ ನಾನು ಒಂದು ಪುಸ್ತಕವನ್ನು ಓದಿದೆ.

entries.source: Where can we find the truth?
Tom knew who the killer was.
I can recommend a good lawyer.
I only wish to help you.
Oh!! I just saw an apparition!!
entries.reference: ಅಯ್ಯೋ !! ಈಗ ತಾನೇ ನಾನು ದೆವ್ವದ ರೂಪ ನೋಡಿದೆ !!

entries.source: Open your book on page nine.
Tom stared sadly out the window.
